channel.title: JetBrains s.r.o. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by JetBrains s.r.o. (jetbrains).

item.title: CVE-2026-65907 · 9.1 CRITICAL
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2026.1.2, 2025.11.6 code execution in Git VCS roots was possible

item.title: CVE-2026-65908 · 8.6 HIGH
item.description: In JetBrains PyCharm before 2026.1.4, 2026.2 arbitrary code execution via malicious Python executable was possible on untrusted project open

item.title: CVE-2026-65906 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2026.1.2, 2025.11.6 сode execution via Kotlin DSL sandbox escape was possible

item.title: CVE-2026-64815 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: In JetBrains IntelliJ IDEA before 2026.2 arbitrary code injection was possible via UI Designer form files

item.title: CVE-2026-64814 · 8.6 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: In JetBrains IntelliJ IDEA before 2026.2 unauthorized file access was possible in a Remote Development session

item.title: CVE-2026-64813 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: In JetBrains IntelliJ IDEA before 2026.2 unauthorized settings modification was possible in a Remote Development session

item.title: CVE-2026-64812 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: In JetBrains IntelliJ IDEA before 2026.2 unauthorized input injection was possible in a Remote Development session

item.title: CVE-2026-64811 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: In JetBrains IntelliJ IDEA before 2026.2 arbitrary code execution was possible before granting project trust via development container configuration

item.title: CVE-2026-64810 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: In JetBrains IntelliJ IDEA before 2026.2 hTML injection was possible in an IDE notification, allowing silent user activity tracking

item.title: CVE-2026-64809 · 8.4 HIGH
item.description: In JetBrains PhpStorm before 2026.2 arbitrary code execution was possible before granting project trust via the configured interpreter

item.title: CVE-2026-64808 · 8.4 HIGH
item.description: In JetBrains PhpStorm before 2026.2 arbitrary code execution was possible before granting project trust via project tooling

item.title: CVE-2026-64807 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: In JetBrains WebStorm before 2026.2 arbitrary code execution was possible via a project-supplied linter configuration

item.title: CVE-2026-64806 · 8.4 HIGH
item.description: In JetBrains WebStorm before 2026.2 arbitrary code execution was possible before granting project trust via the configured Node.js interpreter

item.title: CVE-2026-64805 · 8.4 HIGH
item.description: In JetBrains WebStorm before 2026.2 arbitrary code execution was possible before granting project trust via project-local package-manager tooling

item.title: CVE-2026-64804 · 8.4 HIGH
item.description: In JetBrains WebStorm before 2026.2 arbitrary code execution was possible before granting project trust via project-local linter tooling

item.title: CVE-2026-64803 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: In JetBrains GoLand before 2026.2 arbitrary code execution was possible before granting project trust via the configured Go SDK

item.title: CVE-2026-64802 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: In JetBrains GoLand before 2026.2 arbitrary code execution was possible before granting project trust in the Go Modules integration

item.title: CVE-2026-64800 · 3.5 LOW
item.description: In JetBrains GoLand before 2026.2 sensitive configuration values written to log files by default

item.title: CVE-2026-62422 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: In JetBrains YouTrack before 2026.1.13757, 2025.3.148033, 2025.2.148048, 2025.1.148120, 2024.3.148430, 2024.2.148429 authentication bypass via direct database access leading to administrative access was possible

item.title: CVE-2026-61492 · 3.5 LOW
item.description: In JetBrains YouTrack before 2026.2.17394 stored XSS via article titles in digest emails was possible

item.title: CVE-2026-59796 · 8.1 HIGH
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2026.1.2 pipeline modification was possible due to improper permission checks

item.title: CVE-2026-59795 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2026.1.2 stored XSS via unauthenticated agent registration was possible

item.title: CVE-2026-59794 · 7.3 HIGH
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2026.1.2 stored XSS on the cloud profile page was possible via agent-reported data

item.title: CVE-2026-59793 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2026.1.2 arbitrary file access was possible via the Perforce VCS integration

item.title: CVE-2026-59792 · 9.6 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: In JetBrains IntelliJ IDEA before 2026.1.4, 2026.2 code execution via path traversal in project workspace ID handling was possible

item.title: CVE-2026-59791 · 3.5 LOW
item.description: In JetBrains YouTrack before 2026.2.17012 cSS injection via Mermaid diagram rendering was possible

item.title: CVE-2026-53914 · 6.7 MEDIUM
item.description: In JetBrains Kotlin before 2.4.20 code execution was possible via unsafe deserialization in the build cache metadata

item.title: CVE-2026-57926 · 2.6 LOW
item.description: In JetBrains YouTrack before 2026.2.16593 the websandbox bridge was vulnerable to a prototype pollution attack

item.title: CVE-2026-57925 · 4.3 MEDIUM
item.description: In JetBrains YouTrack before 2026.2.16593 improper access control allowed reading saved queries and tags

item.title: CVE-2026-57924 · 4.3 MEDIUM
item.description: In JetBrains YouTrack before 2026.2.16593 default role configuration exposed excessive user profile details

item.title: CVE-2026-57923 · 5.3 MEDIUM
item.description: In JetBrains YouTrack before 2026.2.16593 improper authorisation in the app configurations endpoint allowed modifying project settings

item.title: CVE-2026-57922 · 3.1 LOW
item.description: In JetBrains YouTrack before 2026.2.16593 project settings disclosure via the MCP was possible

item.title: CVE-2026-57921 · 4.3 MEDIUM
item.description: In JetBrains YouTrack before 2026.2.16593 improper access control allowed reading users' private data via the comment templates endpoint

item.title: CVE-2026-50242 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: In JetBrains Hub before 2026.1.13757, 2025.3.148033, 2025.2.148048, 2025.1.148120, 2024.3.148430, 2024.2.148429 authentication bypass via direct database access leading to administrative access was possible

item.title: CVE-2026-56142 · 9.6 CRITICAL
item.description: In JetBrains Hub before 2026.1.13757, 2025.3.148033, 2025.2.148048, 2025.1.148120, 2024.3.148430, 2024.2.148429 privilege escalation by attaching authentication details to accounts was possible

item.title: CVE-2026-56141 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: In JetBrains Hub before 2026.1.13757, 2025.3.148033, 2025.2.148048, 2025.1.148120, 2024.3.148430, 2024.2.148429 account takeover via predictable restore codes was possible

item.title: CVE-2026-53915 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: In JetBrains GoLand before 2026.1.3 remote code execution was possible via untrusted project configuration

item.title: CVE-2026-49386 · 6.5 MEDIUM
item.description: In JetBrains YouTrack before 2026.1.13570 improper access control allowed enumeration of restricted issues and articles on Planning Canvas

item.title: CVE-2026-49385 · 6.5 MEDIUM
item.description: In JetBrains YouTrack before 2026.1.13570 improper access control allowed low-privileged users to modify service accounts

item.title: CVE-2026-49384 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: In JetBrains PyCharm before 2025.3.4 stored XSS in Jupyter notebook Markdown cells was possible

item.title: CVE-2026-49383 · 3.3 LOW
item.description: In JetBrains IntelliJ IDEA before 2026.1 xXE in the UI Designer form parser was possible

item.title: CVE-2026-49382 · 4.5 MEDIUM
item.description: In JetBrains IntelliJ IDEA before 2026.1 code execution was possible via template injection in the Copyright plugin

item.title: CVE-2026-49381 · 3.4 LOW
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2026.1 stored XSS on the SAML login page was possible

item.title: CVE-2026-49380 · 3.1 LOW 🌩️
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2026.1 open redirect in the SAML plugin was possible

item.title: CVE-2026-49379 · 6.5 MEDIUM
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2026.1 credentials could be exposed in thread names

item.title: CVE-2026-49378 · 4.3 MEDIUM
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2026.1 credentials parameters were exposed via parameter autocompletion

item.title: CVE-2026-49377 · 4.3 MEDIUM
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2025.11.2 exposure of sensitive data via default agent parameters

item.title: CVE-2026-49376 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2026.1 insufficient username validation in the SAML plugin

item.title: CVE-2026-49375 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2026.1, 2025.11.5 reflected XSS was possible on the repository download page

item.title: CVE-2026-49374 · 7.6 HIGH
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2026.1 improper permission checks exposed build configuration parameters
